baseline_output:
[V186 Creator Knowledge Engine — use structure and constraints; do not copy verbatim.]
[V191 Target surface: tiktok — patterns and fragments weighted for this platform + monetization profile.]
Intent: Get more views (intent_views)
Scenario: Tutorial (sc_tutorial)
Recipe: Prefer searchable fitness tags; include one brand-safe community tag.
High-weight patterns:
1. [hashtag_set] [tiktok · hashtag_set] 2 broad FYP-adjacent + 3 niche + 1 intent/offer tag; rotate to avoid spam clusters.
2. [discovery] Mix 2 broad + 3 niche + 1 intent tags; avoid banned or empty vanity tags.
Knowledge fragments (weighted selection):
1. (general_platform_safe) Avoid guaranteed income claims; use 'may', 'often', 'can help'. Disclose paid partnerships when applicable.
2. (tip) Use one branded tag + two topic tags + two discovery tags (#fyp #foryou only if content fits).
3. (commerce_disclosure) TikTok Shop: lead with the problem the product solves in one line, show the product in frame early.
4. (tip) Strong hooks contrast 'common advice' vs 'what actually works' with a specific example niche.
v193_output:
[V186 Creator Knowledge Engine — use structure and constraints; do not copy verbatim.]
[V191 Target surface: tiktok — patterns and fragments weighted for this platform + monetization profile.]
[V193 Platform Observations — additive TikTok boost. Apply when relevant to your generation task.]
Top TikTok observation patterns:
- Hashtag set: one branded tag + three niche tags + two intent tags (e.g. #hook #tutorial). Avoid generic spam tags.
- Hashtag set: #{niche} + #{sub_niche} + #howto + #tips + #creatortok + #fyp (only if hook matches).
[V193.2 Platform Difference Reinforcement — prioritize TikTok hashtag set composition (additive only).]
TikTok hashtag composition rules:
- Focus on distribution context: niche + sub-niche + format/intent tags (tutorial, mistake, beforeafter).
- Avoid generic spam tags unless they truly match the hook (#viral #trending etc). Keep sets tight and relevant.
- Add a branded tag when you have one; rotate broad tags instead of repeating the same ones every post.

Reference TikTok hashtag sets (adapt to the topic):
- Hashtag set: one branded tag + three niche tags + two intent tags (e.g. #hook #tutorial). Avoid generic spam tags.
- Hashtag set: #cozy desk setup for students + #a sub-niche + #howto + #tips + #creatortok + #fyp (only if hook matches).

Output 2–3 distinct ready-to-paste hashtag sets, each 8–16 tags. No explanations.
[V193.3 TikTok Chain Consistency — keep Hook/Caption/Hashtag/Title aligned for one post package.]
Chain style: proof_first · CTA intensity: medium
Shared voice rules:
- Use conversational spoken lines (short clauses, no formal essay tone).
- Keep wording native to TikTok feed language, avoid generic SEO phrasing.
- Carry the same opener intent across hook/caption/title (do not switch premise mid-chain).
Shared pacing rules:
- Front-load value in first line, then support with one tight payoff line.
- Prefer 1-idea-per-line cadence; avoid long compound sentences.
- Hashtag sets should mirror the same content angle as hook/title.
Shared CTA rules:
- CTA = action-oriented but still value-first; ask for one clear next step.
Shared monetization rules:
- Monetization fit: trust-building first (value/proof), then soft conversion.
- Do not use hard-sell language before delivering payoff.
Intent: Get more views (intent_views)
Scenario: Tutorial (sc_tutorial)
Recipe: Prefer searchable fitness tags; include one brand-safe community tag.
High-weight patterns:
1. [hashtag_set] [tiktok · hashtag_set] 2 broad FYP-adjacent + 3 niche + 1 intent/offer tag; rotate to avoid spam clusters.
2. [hashtag] [tiktok · hashtag] Hashtag set: one branded tag + three niche tags + two intent tags (e.g. #hook #tutorial). Avoid generic spam tags.
Knowledge fragments (weighted selection):
1. (general_platform_safe) Avoid guaranteed income claims; use 'may', 'often', 'can help'. Disclose paid partnerships when applicable.
2. (tip) Use one branded tag + two topic tags + two discovery tags (#fyp #foryou only if content fits).
3. (commerce_disclosure) TikTok Shop: lead with the problem the product solves in one line, show the product in frame early.
4. (tip) Strong hooks contrast 'common advice' vs 'what actually works' with a specific example niche.
differences: V193 observation summary present only in v193 run
V193.3 chain consistency block present only in v193 run
conclusion: V193 TikTok observations + chain consistency add tool-specific reinforcement vs baseline.
